how.label: How it works
how.title: A calm path from curiosity to contract

step1.title: Create your profile
step1.body: Share your field, languages, and timeline—we match with intent, not noise.

step2.title: Discover curated roles
step2.body: Internships, traineeships, and mobility tracks with transparent requirements.

step3.title: Apply with support
step3.body: Checklists, templates, and advisors so paperwork never blocks momentum.

step4.title: Arrive ready
step4.body: Onboarding resources and partner introductions for your first weeks abroad.

about.title: We exist to make mobility feel inevitable—not intimidating.
about.p1: European Era is an international platform for internships, Erasmus-style mobility, and employer partnerships. We combine modern product craft with the rigor educators expect.
about.p2: Our team spans Lisbon, Berlin, and remote hubs across Europe. We obsess over clear language, fast pages, and accessibility because trust is designed—not declared.
about.p3: Whether you are a student planning your first crossing or a partner scaling placements, we build tools that respect your time.

opportunitiesPage.title: Opportunities designed for real momentum
opportunitiesPage.subtitle: Fresh listings are added weekly. Save your profile to get matched early.

servicesPage.subtitle: From sourcing to onboarding, we help teams launch mobility programs without friction.

s2.title: Program design
s2.body: Templates for learning agreements, evaluations, and risk checks.

s3.title: Partner success
s3.body: Dedicated onboarding for universities, NGOs, and growing companies.

s4.title: Analytics-ready
s4.body: Export-friendly data for reporting and accreditation cycles.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.p1: European Era processes personal data to operate the platform, match users with opportunities, and comply with applicable EU regulations including GDPR.
privacyPage.p2: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your data by contacting us. We minimize retention and use subprocessors with appropriate safeguards.
privacyPage.p3: This summary is not legal advice. A full policy should be reviewed with counsel before production launch.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.p1: By using European Era you agree to provide accurate information and to use the platform responsibly. Host organizations may impose additional requirements.
termsPage.p2: We may update these terms as the product evolves. Continued use constitutes acceptance of changes.
termsPage.p3: Replace this placeholder with counsel-approved terms before going live.
